sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for Genesis port

special_mechanics.name: Vehicle Acceleration & Speed
special_mechanics.description: Player drives Porsche 928 that accelerates past 300 km/h. Game features vehicle ramming mechanics requiring multiple collisions to stop criminal vehicles.

special_mechanics.name: Time-based Pursuit Mechanics
special_mechanics.description: Initial time limit to reach criminal and time extension to ram criminal vehicle are 60, 65, or 70 seconds. Criminal vehicle constantly moves away.

tier_notes: Tier 3 data: Chase H.Q. is a racing/vehicular combat game, not a platformer with traditional jump physics. No sub-pixel movement, gravity, or jump mechanics are applicable. Game focuses on vehicle acceleration, ramming mechanics, and time-based pursuit gameplay. Available sources provide gameplay overview but no precise physics parameters.
